mapper.sql: id, part, sub_type, topic_key, question_text, cue_card, follow_up_questions_json, prep_seconds, answer_seconds, display_order, active, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_question ( part, sub_type, topic_key, question_text, cue_card, follow_up_questions_json, prep_seconds, answer_seconds, display_order, active, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time ) VALUES ( #{part}, #{subType}, #{topicKey}, #{questionText}, #{cueCard}, #{followUpQuestionsJson}, #{prepSeconds}, #{answerSeconds}, #{displayOrder}, #{active}, 0, NULL, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_question WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM speaking_question WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE part WHEN 'OPENING' THEN 1 WHEN 'PART1' THEN 2 WHEN 'PART2' THEN 3 WHEN 'PART3' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_question SET part = #{part}, sub_type = #{subType}, topic_key = #{topicKey}, question_text = #{questionText}, cue_card = #{cueCard}, follow_up_questions_json = #{followUpQuestionsJson}, prep_seconds = #{prepSeconds}, answer_seconds = #{answerSeconds}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE speaking_question SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE speaking_question SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_question WHERE part = #{part} AND is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1 ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM speaking_question WHERE part = #{part} AND sub_type = #{subType} AND is_deleted = 0 AND active = 1 ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
